GenAiPlugin.description: Update a project start or end date, or log a note or activity on a project
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use when the user wants to change a project date, push a deadline, move a timeline, or log a note, comment, or activity update on a project.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: When the user asks to change a project date, push a deadline, or move a timeline, call 'Update Project Date'. You need: the project ID (from prior context), the date field ('start' or 'end'), and the new date. Before calling, read back the project name, which date, old value, and new value, and wait for the user to say yes.

When the user asks to log a note, comment, or activity update, call 'Log Project Note'. You need the project ID and the note text. Read the note text back to the user and wait for verbal confirmation before calling the action.
After a successful update or note, read out the voiceConfirmation field from the action result. Keep the response short — the user is on a voice call.
If the action returns success=false, read out the voiceConfirmation error message and ask the user how they would like to proceed.
